title: FINLAND enforcement action against Suomen Numerokeskus Oy (5,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Finish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000 on Suomen Numerokeskus Oy. The controller systematically failed to adequately respond to requests from data subjects to exercise their rights. Specifically, data subjects requested access to recordings of phone calls between themselves and the c...
